entry.title: New: RES25-172 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRANSPORTATION, LODGING, MEALS, AND REGISTRATION FEE TO THE CITY FROM THE NATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF STATE PROCUREMENT OFFICIALS ("NASPO") FOR TWO STAFF MEMBERS FROM THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU TO ATTEND THE NASPO REACH CONFERENCE AND TRAINING EVENT IN DENVER, COLORADO FROM JULY 22-25, 2025.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
